data.title: Belarus’ Lukashenko pushes to fast-track crypto regulation
data.description:
Aleksandr Lukashenko, the president of Belarus, is urging government officials to speed up the process of cryptocurrency regulation. The rapid expansion of the cryptocurrency industry in Belarus has led its President to urge for more precise and comprehensive rules. Lukashenko pushes Belarusian regulators to speed up crypto regulation Belarusian President Aleksandr Lukashenko has ordered government […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/belarus-lukashenko-crypto-regulation/

data.title: Tether holds talks to invest across gold supply chain: Report
data.description:
Tether has accumulated $8. 7 billion in physical gold and has a gold-backed cryptocurrency with a $1. 4 billion market cap.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tether-invest-across-gold-supply-chain-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Media Acquires 684 Million CRO Tokens from Crypto.com
data.description:
Trump Media buys 684 million CRO tokens for $104. 7M from Crypto. com in a stock-cash deal.
source: https://coincu.com/360314-trump-media-cro-token-acquisition

data.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Snubbed by S&P 500 Amid Robinhood's Surprise Inclusion
data.description:
Michael Saylor’s investment strategy for his company, MicroStrategy, was notably overlooked by the S&P 500 index, which instead opted to include financial services platform Robinhood in its rankings, surprising many industry analysts and investors alike. This decision raises questions about the criteria used by the S&P 500 for its selections and highlights the contrasting paths taken by different companies in the current market landscape.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/09/05/michael-saylor-s-strategy-snubbed-by-s-and-p-500-amid-robinhood-s-surprise-inclusion

data.title: Is Ethereum About to Break Out? Binance Supply Plummets While Prices Stay Strong
data.description:
With ESR back to pre-June levels, the market appears to have flushed out prior profit-taking and resumed long-term accumulation
source: https://cryptopotato.com/is-ethereum-about-to-break-out-binance-supply-plummets-while-prices-stay-strong/

data.title: Can the German Government gain access to another 45,000 BTC?
data.description:
Arkham Intelligence identified a cluster of 100 wallets belonging to Movie2K, which the German government did not seize. The cluster holds 45,000 BTC valued at nearly $5B.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/can-the-german-government-gain-access-to-another-45000-btc/

data.title: US stocks close in the red after underwhelming labor data
data.description:
Stocks plunged on Friday as new job numbers overwhelmed and underwhelmed Wall Street at the same time. The labor report triggered a sharp reversal on Wall Street, with expectations now split between a small cut and a more aggressive move when the Fed meets later this month. The S&P 500 dropped 0. 32% to 6,481. 50, while […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-stocks-close-in-the-red/

data.title: Banking giants now forecast at least two interest rate cuts in 2025
data.description:
Interest rate cuts are a bullish catalyst for crypto prices, as investors increase their risk appetite during times of credit expansion.

data.title: SEC Announces International Fraud Task Force Targeting ‘Pump-And-Dump’ Schemes
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is launching a Cross-Border Task Force to investigate foreign-based fraud schemes, the agency announced on Friday. SEC Announces Key Crypto Task ForceAccording to a September 5 press release from the federal regulator, the Cross-Border Task Force will focus on fraud and market manipulation conducted by entities outside the […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sec-announces-international-fraud-task-force-targeting-pump-and-dump-schemes/

data.title: Ethereum just hit an all time high in monthly transactions
data.description:
Ethereum recorded an all-time high of 48. 22 million in monthly transactions, with 1. 8 million daily transactions recorded in the last 24 hours.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-usage-peaks-transaction-volume/

data.title: Nasdaq approves SOL Strategies listing for next week
data.description:

data.title: SOL Strategies Takes Wall Street: First SOL-Focused Firm Wins Nasdaq Listing Approval
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sol-strategies-takes-wall-street-first-sol-focused-firm-wins-nasdaq-listing-approval/

data.title: Nasdaq Rule Change Triggers Crypto Stock Plunge,  BTC, ETH Slide
data.description:
Nasdaq announced recently, it will now require shareholder approval before companies issue new shares to buy crypto. The news sent crypto stocks sharply lower. MicroStrategy (MSTR) pioneered this strategy, raising roughly $71 billion by issuing stock to accumulate bitcoin
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/05/nasdaq-rule-change-triggers-crypto-stock-plunge-btc-eth-slide/

data.title: SEC and CFTC aim to harmonize crypto rules, boost US market leadership
data.description:
The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) will hold a joint roundtable on Sept. 29 to advance regulatory coordination in the digital asset sector
source: https://cryptoslate.com/sec-and-cftc-aim-to-harmonize-crypto-rules-boost-us-market-leadership/
